Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jul-19-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Plaintiffs PUJA AGGARWAL, KELLY BEHUNIN, VICTOR RIXE, CHRISTINA STEINBERG, MICHAEL TRAN's Petition to Confirm Arbitration Award.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Petitioners' unopposed "petition to confirm arbitration award" is granted.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not reported. (302/RBU)

***After hearing, an order and judgment are signed. (See scanned documents for details)
